tasks.title: [PLAN] "Create New Module" card in product category grid
tasks.description:
Category: Features / Improvements
- Add a dashed-border card at the end of the ProductsGrid (same height/width as product cards)
- Card shows a "+" icon and "Create New Module" label — admin-only visibility
- Clicking it opens an inline form or modal with proper UX:
- Title field (required)
- Description field (optional textarea)
- Category auto-filled from current category page
- Tags input (comma-separated or chip-style)
- Highlights input (comma-separated or chip-style)
- Draft by default (`published: false`) — no publish toggle, always starts as draft
- On submit: creates product in Supabase with default "Getting Started" page
- Navigates to new module's manage-videos page after creation
- Replaces or supplements the existing `CreateModuleForm` button above the grid
- Plan should cover: input field UX, validation, error states, mobile layout, loading state

tasks.title: [PLAN] YouTube transcript auto-fetch for rich editor
tasks.description:
Category: Features / Improvements
- Transcript section in RichContentEditor should only show when page has a video URL
- When video URL is YouTube, show a "Fetch from YouTube" button next to transcript label
- Button calls a new Supabase Edge Function (`fetch-youtube-transcript`) that:
- Extracts video ID from URL
- Fetches YouTube page → extracts captionTracks from ytInitialPlayerResponse
- Downloads caption XML → parses into timestamped segments (~20s chunks)
- Returns formatted text: `0:00 Text here...\n0:16 Next segment...`
- Fetched transcript populates the editable textarea (admin can edit/clean up)
- Add `videoUrl` prop to RichContentEditor, pass `editVideo.url` from VideoEditForm
- Loom support deferred (needs API key)
- Edge function needs deployment: `supabase functions deploy fetch-youtube-transcript`
